summary: Iter 52 â€” Persistent Booking Cart + Agency Dashboard V2 (11 modules) + 25 new /api/agency/* endpoints. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests green covering full cart lifecycle (anon emptyâ†’cookie set, snapshot, duplicate guard, patch, remove, clear, anonâ†’user merge on login), agency role-guards (customerâ†’403, anonâ†’401), agency overview KPIs, offline artists CRUD + marketplace privacy, clients CRM with notes + follow-ups (fan-out to notifications), events CRUD + filters, staff dup-email 409, invoice math (subtotal/tax/total), invoice statusâ†’paid, expenses, finance summary shape, three reports endpoints, calendar aggregate, notifications feed + mark-read, and regression on /artists/search, /bookings/mine, /auth/me, /homepage/spotlight, /event-planner/suggest. Frontend: /cart route renders empty state + cookie set for anon, Book Now on artist profile (logged-out) navigates to /login?next=/cart, all 11 agency module test-ids present when their route is active (agency-overview, agency-artists, agency-bookings, agency-clients, agency-events, agency-calendar, agency-finance, agency-staff, agency-reports, agency-documents, agency-notifications), sidebar toggle works, CartIcon in top nav renders with badge that updates to '1' after adding an item, cart grand-total math verified visually as Subtotal â‚ą25,000 + Platform Fee â‚ą1,250 (5%) + GST â‚ą225 (18% of fee) = Grand â‚ą26,475 (exact match with spec). Legacy /agency-legacy still renders the old AgencyDashboard for regression.

issues: Artist meta line shows raw stored category text (e.g. 'Bollywood Vocalist Â· Mumbai Â· hvhv') because the `package_name` snapshot falls back to whatever the cheapest package name is â€” if a legacy package doc has a garbage/placeholder name it surfaces on the cart. Not a bug in cart.py; underlying package doc needs cleanup. Consider filtering package_name to hide short/placeholder-looking values.

action_items: OPTIONAL: filter obviously-placeholder package names in cart snapshot (e.g. skip package_name < 3 chars) so the cart doesn't display garbage text next to legit artist meta.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/cart.py:117-133 (_resolve_cart_key) â€” nice touch: swallows get_current_user 401 and falls back to anon. This is the correct pattern for a cart endpoint (both auth and unauth clients hit the same route). Just note that if get_current_user_fn ever raises a non-HTTPException upstream error (DB timeout, etc.), it will silently be treated as anon and the user will lose their cart items on that request. Consider narrowing the except to HTTPException.

backend/routes/cart.py:154-172 (_merge_anon_into_user) â€” dedupe key is (artist_id, event_date). Good. Edge case: if the same anon cart is merged twice concurrently (double-tab login race), _push runs twice â†’ duplicates. Wrap in an idempotency check via cart doc version or a mongo $addToSet on a unique compound field. Low-severity; requires concurrent logins from same browser to reproduce.

backend/routes/agency_crm.py:439 by_status dict-comp â€” `{b['_id'] or 'sent': ...}` will collapse multiple statuses that share None/'sent' aliasing. Very minor: the aggregate `_id` field is $status which is always populated at insert time as 'sent', so this is a defensive branch, not a real bug.

backend/routes/agency_crm.py:174 offline-artists PATCH â€” doesn't validate `linked_artist_id` refers to a real BT artist. If an agency links to a non-existent artist_id the offline record still saves and the ProfileLink UI will 404 on click. Add a light existence check.

backend/routes/agency_crm.py:483 revenue-report â€” uses `$substr` on `created_at` which is stored as ISO string. Correct for 'YYYY-MM' extraction. Just be aware: if created_at is ever migrated to native BSON date this will silently return empty groups.

frontend/src/pages/agency/AgencyDashboardV2.jsx:69 â€” collapsed toggle only affects visual sidebar. The CSS class `.ag-body.collapsed .ag-sidebar` should reduce width to 72px. Not testable via query_selector at this level (only via computed style), but visually verified via screenshot (button flipped between â€ş and â€ą).

frontend/src/pages/CartPage.jsx:32-38 totals â€” Math.round(subtotal * 0.05) + Math.round(platform_fee * 0.18) matches the spec exactly (â‚ą25 000 â†’ â‚ą1 250 â†’ â‚ą225 â†’ â‚ą26 475). No rounding drift.

frontend/src/components/CartIcon.jsx â€” polls /api/cart via useBookingCart on mount; badge reactivity confirmed live (added item â†’ badge went from hidden to '1' after cart page reload). Note: badge does NOT auto-update from a *different* page unless useBookingCart's context is app-wide. Currently the hook is called inside CartIcon separately from CartPage â€” two hook instances. For a global reactive badge across every route, lift the state into a CartContext (deferred UX polish).

frontend/src/pages/agency/modules/*.jsx â€” each module owns its own data-testid at the root div. This is the correct location; tests must navigate to the route to assert it. All 11 verified present when route is active.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter52_cart_and_agency.py (NEW â€” 24 tests across TestCart[6], TestAgencyRoleGuard[3], TestAgencyOverview[1], TestOfflineArtists[1], TestAgencyClients[1], TestAgencyEvents[1], TestAgencyStaff[1], TestAgencyFinance[2], TestAgencyReportsCalendar[3], TestRegression[5])

success_rate.frontend: 100% (cart route + anon cookie + agency dashboard V2 loads + all 11 module test-ids reachable + sidebar toggle + CartIcon badge live-updates + legacy /agency-legacy still renders + cart totals math exact to spec)

test_credentials: agency@booktalent.com / Agency@123 (agency CRM + dashboard V2); customer@booktalent.com / Customer@123 (cart merge + role-guard 403); public /artists/search used to source real artist_id for cart snapshots.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates TEST_-prefixed offline artists / clients / events / staff / invoices / expenses / notifications and cleans up (delete-on-tear-down where applicable). One customer cart is cleared at end of anonâ†’user merge test. All test data is safely namespaced.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 52 is fully green. IMPORTANT for future testing agents: the backend test file requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var to be exported before running pytest, otherwise it falls back to localhost:8001 where cookies over http lose Secure flag and half the auth-dependent tests fail. Command: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && pytest backend/tests/test_iter52_cart_and_agency.py -v`. Cart merges are keyed by (artist_id, event_date) so duplicate-guard tests must use distinct dates. Agency module test-ids live on the module root div so are only queryable when the corresponding /agency/<slug> route is active â€” iterate through the 11 routes to verify.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A â€” no bugs found in Iter 52 changes. Only one design-nit surfaced (garbage package name text on cart row) which stems from pre-existing package documents with placeholder names, not from this iteration's snapshot code.
